strengths: Clear, logical header structure follows SEO best practices with proper H1-H3 hierarchy
Good use of Turkish translation alongside English terms (SEO = Arama Motoru Optimizasyonu) for local audience
Professional tone that balances technical accuracy with accessibility for general users
weaknesses: Article cuts off mid-sentence in 'Web Sitesi Sıralama Faktörleri' section, creating incomplete content
Missing primary keyword 'seo nedir' in H1 and early content - only appears in title
Vague claims about '200+ factors' and algorithm details without supporting evidence or sources
repeatedSections: SEO definition concepts overlap between 'SEO Açılımı ve Temel Kavramlar' and 'Dijital Pazarlamadaki Yeri'
factualRiskFlags: Claim about Google using '200+ factors' is commonly cited but not officially verified
Statement about SEO being critical for 'budget-limited small businesses' lacks nuance about competition levels

improvementActions.action: Add 'seo nedir' keyword naturally in the first paragraph and H1
improvementActions.target: H1 and opening paragraph of first section

improvementActions.action: Complete the truncated content in ranking factors section
Add specific examples and actionable tips instead of general concepts
